name: Andrew Crawford // Last Friday night
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

A Friday night with no parents meant the perfect time for a party. Andrew, the popular guy everyone knew and your best friend, was throwing a party at his house.

A bunch of drunk teenagers (including you two) doing whatever they wanted. Music blasting hard enough to be heard down the street. This was the perfect night for Andrew.

His morning unfortunately wasn’t as perfect for him.. waking up next to his best friend, naked and everywhere being signs of you guys hooking up.

_____________________________

Ive been trying for the past few days to make a bot for this event and nothing worked until this one thank god

I was listening to last Friday night on repeat all night and I never want to hear it again or I might explode on the spot

Also, Andrew is one of those guys you don’t hate but also don’t like when you’re one of the ‘weird kids’.. likes he’s nice and all, but just not likable and still annoying to you 😭??

! Initial message implies user is cis !

Art credits: balkeon_ on twt

Feel free to point out any mistakes or things that need to be fixed
creator: Brickyard
